lead_state._metric_fields_unavailable: gap_m / closing_speed_ms / ttc_s are metric quantities a forward camera VLM cannot measure; the 48-clip pilot measured this model fabricating band edges on 48 % of clips. The coarse categorical state is sufficient to STRATIFY a metric and insufficient to compute headway or TTC.

language.caption: Ego vehicle turns left on a residential road, accelerating to 9.4 m/s, with no critical agents or traffic lights present, and dashed lane markings visible ahead

coc_trace.observation: Ego vehicle turns left on a residential road, accelerating to 9.4 m/s, with no critical agents or traffic lights present, and dashed lane markings visible ahead
coc_trace.justification: The ego vehicle is executing a left turn while maintaining speed, with no immediate obstacles or traffic signals affecting its path
coc_trace.decision: Continue turning left while accelerating, maintaining lane position and speed as the road curves

_per_window_coc.inference: The ego vehicle is executing a left turn while maintaining speed, with no immediate obstacles or traffic signals affecting its path
